title: viburnum elatum var. cuneifolium
intro: Viburnum elatum var. cuneifolium, also known as the mountain sweet viburnum, is a deciduous shrub or small tree native to eastern North America. Its medicinal properties include the presence of flavonoids, alkaloids, and terpenoids, which have been used in traditional herbal medicine to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Viburnum elatum var. cuneifolium include its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce inflammation, and act as an antimicrobial agent, making it useful for treating fever, colds, and respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of Viburnum elatum var. cuneifolium include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
